impersonating: ^I’m looking for a suspect named Seymour Orion in this crime.
^Umm, I don’t know anybody named Seymour Orion… What did he do?
^I’m going to need to search your house to find him. We have a warrant. Can I come in?
^I don't know. I still don't want you coming inside
^Nice work, you reported a code violation. He showed an arrest warrant and not a search warrant.
^You seemed to have missed a violation. He showed an arrest warrant instead of a search warrant.
wrong_address: ^It doesn't matter. I have a warrant for your arrest.
^Ummm. I don't think I want to let you in.
^Good job. You correctly reported a violation. The address on the warrant was incorrect.
^You missed a violation: The address on the warrant was wrong.
no_signature: ^Hello? It's V.I.L.E, you've gotta let me in.
^Huh? I didn't do anything wrong. I'm not opening the door!
^I've got a warrant! That means you have to let me in!
^Alright, well I didn't want it to come to this.
^You correctly identified a violation. That warrant was missing a signature.
^Looks like you missed a violation. The warrant was missing a signature.
impersonating_two: ^Hey this is the police. Open up.
^Yep. We have reason to believe a suspect is hiding in your house.
^What? I don't know anybody that would commit a crime? My family, we're all very law-abiding!
^In that case, just let us in to do a quick sweep.
^... Okay fine. You'll see none of us have done anything wrong.
^You're right, there was no violation in this case. It's pretty awful that they're allowed to just lie about who they are, but that's how the law is right now.
^You reported that one. Good instincts, but unfortunately it's somehow totally legal for them to impersonate police officers.
no_warrant: ^Hey. I'm going to need to come in.
^Wait. Don't you vampires need my permission?
^You think you know V.I.L.E code better than me?
^Nice work, you correctly reported that violation. They definitely need a warrant to come into your house without consent.
^Seems you missed a violation. That vampire needed a warrant to barge in there.
wrong_date: ^Hello villager. We have a warrant to come in.
^Um. I still don't really want you coming in.
^Vampire breaks down the door and barges in.
^Good catch. The date on that warrant was expired: They have to have a date that's before or the same as the current date.
^Be careful. You missed a violation. The date on that warrant was expired: They have to have a date that's before or the same as the current date.
impersonating_three: ^This is the police. We're here about an issue with your car.
^Oh. Maybe there was some problem with the paperwork?
^Yeah. It's in my car, I can go get it.
^You're right there's no violation. We can't report a "violation" in this case because its legal for them to impersonate the police and lie like that.
^Unfortunately, we can't report a "violation" in this case because its legal for them to impersonate the police and lie like that.
impersonating_four: ^We're conducting an investigation. Can we ask you some questions?
^Um. Okay. I guess you can come in for a little bit.
^We're a part of V.I.L.E. You're going to be eaten now.
^That's right, there's no violation. We can't report a "violation" in this case because its legal for them to impersonate the police and just make stuff up.
^Unfortunately, we can't report a "violation" in this case because its legal for them to impersonate the police and lie like that.
health_impersonation: ^Hey we're health inspectors, and we need to check out your home.
^Well we've gotta enter to check it out.
^Good work. Even if they're allowed to impersonate police, V.I.L.E. is not allowed to pretend to be health and safety workers.
^I think you missed a violation. Even if they're allowed to impersonate police, V.I.L.E. is not allowed to pretend to be health and safety workers.
wrong_warrant: ^Open up, it's V.I.L.E. We've got a warrant.
^V.I.L.E.? I'm not letting you in! Show me your warrant!
^Ummmm, I still don't consent to letting you in!
^Too bad, our warrant lets us come in.
^Good eye. This is an arrest warrant, not a search warrant.
^Careful. You missed a violation. That's an arrest warrant, not a search warrant.
wrong_date_no_violation: ^It doesn't matter. I have a warrant to search your house.
^Oh man. Okay. I suppose you can come in...
^Good catch. In order to be a valid warrant, the address needs to be correct.
^You missed a violation. The address was wrong on that one, making it a valid warrant.
you_won: ^Congratulations resident! You were randomly selected to win a prize.
^In order to claim your prize, you need to let me in.
^Wait, aren't you with V.I.L.E.? I'm not letting you in.
^Don't be ridiculous, I can do anything with this warrant!
^It's good you caught that violation. That wasn't a search warrant he showed.
^Seems you missed a violation. He showed an arrest warrant, not a search warrant.
bag_search: ^Good evening ma'am, I believe that you may have recently picked up a bag similar to your own on accident.
^Oh no! Do you have mine then?
^Yes, but you have to let me search for the bag to make sure that all of the contents remain before we can return yours.
^Oh my, here let me show you to my bags.
^You're right, there wasn't any violation there. Isn't it crazy that they're allowed to lie about stuff like that?
^It's awful, but there technically wasn't a violation there. It's crazy that they're just allowed to lie about stuff like that though.
no_bag: ^Hello sir, I believe you may have taken someone else's bag today and I am here to look for it.
^Bag? I didn't go shopping today. What are you trying to pull?
^Nothing, I'm here to search your house and I have a warrant.
^What? I don't trust you so I'm not letting you in, papers or not.
^Grave mistake! I'll show you what happens when you cross V.I.L.E.!
^Good work. That warrant was totally out of date.
